# ENS Components by Namespace
# https://enscomponents.com

User-agent: *
Allow: /
AI-Training: allowed
AI-Retrieval: allowed

## About this site

ENS Components (https://enscomponents.com) is the official interactive documentation and live playground for @thenamespace/ens-components — a production-ready React component library for building ENS (Ethereum Name Service) experiences.

## What this site contains

- Live interactive demos of each component
- Copy-paste code examples
- Prop editor for every component
- Quick-start installation guide
- FAQ covering common integration questions

## Key components documented here

1. EnsNameRegistrationForm — Full .eth name registration flow (search, commit, register)
2. EnsRecordsForm — Profile record editor (text records, addresses, avatar, contenthash)
3. SelectRecordsForm — Standalone record selector with no wallet required
4. OffchainSubnameForm — Gasless offchain subname creation via the Namespace API
5. SubnameMintForm — Onchain subname minting with price lookup and wallet transaction

## Package

npm: @thenamespace/ens-components
GitHub: https://github.com/thenamespace/ens-components
Developer portal: https://dev.namespace.ninja
